'''''Lucky Star II''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] that [[Daeshara'cor]] took from [[Docking Bay 9372]] to [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''
